tuning: D A D G B E
content:
Relatively easy, but it sounds so nice when you get the strumming right. 
It is according to the video, so it should be perfect! 
Watch the amazing cover for the strumming pattern: http://www.youtube.com/watch?NR=1&v=4cb3lcCnAsc

Tuning: Drop D

Not 100% on the chord names, but just follow them and it should sound good.

[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]A#6[/ch]   [ch]C6[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D5[/ch]  [ch]F5[/ch]
e|--(5)--(7)--(8)--(10)--x---x---x---x---|
B|---6----8----8----10---6---5---x---x---|
G|---7----9----10---12---7---5---x---x---|
D|---8----10---12---14---7---5---12--3---|
A|---5----7----8----10---5---3---12--3---|
D|---5----7----8----10---x---x---12--3---|[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm more than just an option, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
 Hey, Refuse to be forgotten, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
 Hey, I took a chance with my heart, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F5[/ch]
 Hey, and I feel it taking over[/tab]

[Chorus]:
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I better find your love and, I better find your heart[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I better find your love and, I better find your heart[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A#6[/ch]                          [ch]C6[/ch]
I better find your love and, I better find your heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D5[/ch]     [ch]F5[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
I bet if I give all my love, then nothing's gonna tear us apart[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 I’m more than just a number, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]
 Hey, I doubt you’ll find another, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
 Hey, So every single summer, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                                    [ch]F5[/ch]
 Hey, I be the one that you remember[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
 It’s more than just a mission, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
 Hey,  You hear but you don’t listen, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
 Hey, You better pay attention, Hey, Hey[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                                  [ch]F5[/ch]
 Hey, And get what you been missing[/tab]

[Chorus]

Bridge:
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]
 Too many times I’ve been wrong[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]A#6[/ch]

Another amazing cover by one of my favourite bands :)
